request_mainline: owner module constructs metadata with one explicit `MetadataWriteOwner`
owner module constructs metadata with one explicit `MetadataWriteNode`
owner module attaches a `MetadataSubject` carrying trace/session/turn identity without carrying request text
metadata entry keys are validated before admission
metadata center stores only validated internal control/provenance metadata
response_mainline: metadata center returns accepted metadata records as internal provenance/control truth
metadata center can query records by `trace_id` for debugging and audit correlation
serialized metadata remains replay-safe without becoming request-chain data
error_mainline: missing metadata id, writer owner, writer node, trace id, or entries is rejected explicitly
request-data-like keys such as `request.*`, `payload.*`, `prompt.*`, `input.*`, `content`, or `text` are rejected explicitly
invalid metadata is not stored and is not rewritten into debug/session/request truth
no fallback path exists for recovering request content from metadata

shared_functions.purpose: enforce metadata owner, write-node, subject, and request-data key separation before metadata can be stored or forwarded
shared_functions.why_shared: avoids each module inventing its own metadata provenance and request-isolation checks

allowed_callers: runtime/reason/provider/node/debug integration layers after they construct metadata envelopes
shared_functions.why_shared: keeps metadata admission and validation in one owner instead of distributed module-local maps

call_table.responsibility: identify the feature/symbol that wrote metadata
identify the pipeline node where metadata was written
call_table.input_semantic: pipeline node and optional runtime node id

call_table.responsibility: identify trace/session/turn subject without request text

call_table.output_semantic: accepted metadata envelope or explicit error

call_table.responsibility: enforce owner, write-node, subject, entry, and request-key rules
admit validated metadata into the center
query metadata records by trace id for audit/debug correlation

sync_status: metadata envelope, writer owner, write node, subject, validation, and in-memory center are bound in code
first integration slice does not yet wire runtime/reason/provider producers into the metadata center
generated wiki must be regenerated from `docs/mainline-calls/metadata.core.json` when this function-map truth changes
